title: tillandsia spiculosa var. micrantha
intro: Tillandsia spiculosa var. micrantha, also known as the 'False Tillandsia', is a type of epiphytic air plant belonging to the Bromeliad family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tillandsia spiculosa var. micrantha include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
